_meta.priorRun: COV-2026-03-21-1337 (P0 — CART, CHECKOUT, PAYMENT, SECURITY, API-REST already addressed)

gaps.detail: TestRail has C389107-C389126 (20 cases) for order list, filtering, status, search, sorting, pagination. Suite 04c has ~18 ORD cases total covering some of these but missing depth: status filtering, date range filters, sorting, search reset, pagination edge cases.
TestRail C389121-C389123: mobile order list, mobile filters, mobile status display. No mobile-specific tests in Suite 04c.
Suite 04c has basic order detail but missing: line item details display, shipment tracking link, payment method display on detail, address display on order, order timeline/history.
Suite 04c has 17 QUOTE cases covering RFQ basics. Missing: counter-offer from buyer, multi-round negotiation, adding/removing items mid-quote, quote item quantity changes.
Missing: expired quote cannot be accepted, expired quote shows clear status, quote status transitions visible in history, notification on status change.

gaps.feature: Quote to order conversion edge cases
gaps.detail: Missing: convert quote with out-of-stock item, convert quote after price change, partial quote conversion, quote conversion preserves PO number.

TestRail C389086-C398688 + C413993-C414010: 28 cases for org switcher, search bar, keyboard nav, persistence. Suite 13 has 11 B2C-ORG cases — missing search functionality (10+ orgs threshold), keyboard navigation, persistence across browser sessions.
No tests verify that switching org clears/isolates cart. Critical for B2B: each org has separate cart, switching must not leak items or pricing between orgs.
No tests verify that product prices change when switching orgs (contract pricing). BL-PRICE-007 requires org members see contract prices.
No storefront tests for inviting a member to organization. TestRail C398690-C398691 cover invite with multi-org. Missing: invite form, email sent, new member sign-in, role assignment.
No tests for editing member roles on storefront. Missing: change role, verify permissions update, admin vs purchaser access differences.
No tests for blocking/unblocking company members. TestRail C412652 covers removal. Missing: block prevents sign-in, unblock restores access.
No tests for purchase approval workflow. Missing: purchaser creates order pending approval, approver approves/rejects, notification to purchaser, order proceeds after approval.
Suite 13 has B2C-LIST cases but 'Shared Lists' section may be shallow. TestRail has 171 list cases. Missing: share list with team member, edit shared list, remove shared access, concurrent edits.
TestRail C388974-C388975+ has bulk order cases. Suite 13 has 'Bulk Order' section but TestRail depth likely greater. Missing: CSV upload, paste multiple SKUs, invalid SKU handling, quantity per line.
Quick order may exist in bulk order section but needs depth: SKU autocomplete, partial SKU match, non-existent SKU error, add multiple rows, clear form.
Suite 13 has 'Dashboard' section. Need to verify: recent orders widget accuracy, monthly spend display, quick links, personalized greeting.

Suite 02 has 2 impersonation tests (TestRail C396959). Missing: switch companies while impersonating, stop impersonation restores admin state, impersonation banner visible, impersonated user cannot impersonate others.
Feature-domain-map lists all COMPARE features as GAP. No tests in Suite 03 for comparison: add to compare, compare page, remove from compare, max products limit, compare across categories.
Suite 13 has 'Notifications' and 'Back in Stock' sections. May need depth: mark as read, clear all, notification types, empty state, pagination in dropdown.
Suite 04c has Orders > Reorder section. Missing negative cases: reorder when product discontinued, reorder with price change notification, reorder partial (some items unavailable).
Suite 04c has Orders > Returns section. Need depth: return reason selection, partial return, return status tracking, return window expiry, return with different quantities.
Suite 13 has 'Ship To' section. Need depth: ship-to selector filters by org, switching org updates ship-to list, add new address scoped to org, default address per org.
Compare button on product cards in catalog listing. No tests for: compare checkbox/button on card, compare bar appears, navigate to compare page from catalog.
TestRail C398685-C398688: default org selection, empty default, persistence after sign-out/in. Suite 13 may partially cover but TestRail has explicit test cases.
Suite 13 has list cases. Missing: add entire list to cart, add partial list, handle out-of-stock items in list, list with variations (need to select options).
No tests for viewing company members list on storefront: member list display, search members, filter by role, pagination.
Suite 04c has Orders > Documents section. Need depth: PDF downloads successfully, PDF contains correct order data, multiple document types (invoice, packing slip).
Suite 13 has 'Loyalty' section. Need depth: points balance display, points history, points earning after purchase, points redemption at checkout.
Suite 04c has Orders > Cancellation section. Need depth: cancel with reason, cancel partially shipped order (blocked), cancel and verify refund initiated, cancel window enforcement.
Suite 04c has Orders > Confirmation section. Need depth: all order details displayed, print functionality, continue shopping link, email confirmation reference, order number format.
Suite 13 has 'Back in Stock' section. Need depth: subscribe to alert, receive notification when restocked, unsubscribe, multiple products alerts.
